lines.speaker: Gunslik
lines.text: What can I interest you in? We have something of everything here!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh good!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing, thanks.

lines.speaker: Gunslik
lines.text: Hullo, [player name]. Interested in doing a little job for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds interesting, what can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Gunslik
lines.text: I've got a very specific task for you, for a very special customer. Can you get me [item] in the next [15-20] minutes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er, you want [item]?

lines.speaker: Gunslik
lines.text: For a very special customer, yes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right, then... I'll get you [item] in the next [15-20] minutes. I'm on it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not interested, no.

lines.speaker: Gunslik
lines.text: I'm really sorry to hear that, I thought you were just the human for the job.

lines.speaker: Gunslik
lines.text: Hullo, [player name]. Interested in doing a little job for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds interesting, what can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Gunslik
lines.text: Let's see now... Can you get me [X] [item] in the next [X] minutes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right, then... I'll get you [X] [item] in the next [X] minutes. I'm on it.

sections.title: Talking to him before acquiring the item request

lines.speaker: Gunslik
lines.text: Did you get me [item], [player name]? I don't really have an awful lot of time anymore.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know and I don't care. I quit!

lines.speaker: Gunslik
lines.text: No need to be rude about it! Especially since you promised me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just give me a little bit more time.

lines.speaker: Gunslik
lines.text: Sure, but please hurry up!

sections.title: Talking to him after failing to bring the request in time

lines.speaker: Gunslik
lines.text: [player name], you didn't get me my [item] within the [X] minutes I gave you. I'm disappointed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I just ran out of time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry about it, I've got your [item] right here.

lines.speaker: Gunslik
lines.text: It's too late for that. What am I supposed to do with [item] now?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Am I still on time? I've got you [X] [item]!

lines.speaker: Gunslik
lines.text: You certainly are! Thank you very much!

lines.speaker: Gunslik
lines.text: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you prefer me to tell you about some crafting secrets?

lines.speaker: Gunslik
lines.text: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you prefer me to teach you a bit about how you can mine more efficiently?

lines.speaker: Gunslik
lines.text: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you like me to show you some smithing tricks?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like the gold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Please teach me that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Show me the gold!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Enlighten me.
